mission.title: vllm: [RFC]: Deprecating vLLM V0
mission.description: [RFC]: Deprecating vLLM V0. This issue affects 61+ users.

steps.title: Identify vllm upgrade symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your vllm installation:
```bash
vllm version
vllm status 2>&1 | head -20
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review vllm configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vllm configuration:
vLLM V1 has been the default engine since version v0.8.0, released approximately three months ago.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [RFC]: Deprecating vLLM V0
steps.description:
Support quantization on neuron

1. Adds fbgemm_fp8 support for neuron.
2. Allows neuron users to run pre-quantized checkpoints. This includes accepting all act_dtypes as the data type validation is performed in NxDI.

RFC: #15970

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Confirm [RFC]: Deprecating vLLM V0 is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test vllm to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Support quantization on neuron

1. Adds fbgemm_fp8 support for neuron.
2. Allows neuron users to run pre-quantized checkpoints. This includes accepting all act_dtypes as the data type validation is performed in NxDI.

RFC: #15970

prerequisites.description: A working vllm installation or development environment.
